history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man stands confidently in front of a vibrant red vintage van. He has dark, styled hair and is wearing a maroon quarter-zip sweatshirt with white stripes on the sleeves and a white graphic design on the front that reads "STGO" with checkered flags. He's paired this with baggy, dark wash denim jeans and grey and white athletic shoes.

The van, which appears to be a food or coffee truck, has a black roof with white lettering that says "kopidew". A spare tire is mounted on the back. The van is parked on a hexagonal patterned stone driveway. Behind the van, lush green foliage forms a dense backdrop. The lighting is bright and natural, suggesting an outdoor daytime setting, creating a cheerful and casual mood. The color palette is dominated by the striking red of the van, contrasted with the dark tones of the man's clothing and the green of the background.
